author: Magda Gonczaruk
title: Crispy Garlic Parmesan Potatoes
instructions_list: Place potatoes in a pot of salted water. Bring to a boil and then cook for 8 minutes, until just fork-tender.
Drain well and let them steam dry for a few minutes.
Transfer potatoes to a bowl. Add olive oil, garlic, Italian seasonings, pinch of salt, and pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Spread grated parmesan on a plate. Roll each potato piece in the parmesan, pressing lightly so it sticks on all sides.
Place potatoes cut-side down on a baking sheet.
Roast at 220°C (425°F) for 25–30 minutes, until golden and crispy.
Transfer to a serving plate, sprinkle with fresh parsley. Serve with a homemade fresh herb dip on the side.
description: If you’re looking for the perfect BBQ side dish, these crispy garlic parmesan potatoes are it. Golden baby potatoes, coated in a garlicky parmesan crust and roasted until deeply crispy. They’re ready in 40 minutes and honestly impossible to stop eating.
